description: Power BI App configuration for Clearwater Health Analytics. Defines navigation structure and audience-based access, replacing legacy SSRS email subscriptions and Crystal Reports client-side distribution.

app.name: Clearwater Health Analytics
app.description: Enterprise analytics app for Clearwater Health System — financial, clinical, quality, and operational reports consolidated from legacy SSRS and Crystal Reports.

navigation.description: Report navigation organized by audience/department to replace the legacy SSRS folder hierarchy (/RevenueCycle/, /Clinical/, /Executive/) and Crystal Reports file-share structure.

sections.name: Financial
sections.description: Revenue cycle and financial reporting — replaces SSRS /RevenueCycle/ folder

items.description: Daily revenue summary by department with drill-through to detail. Migrated from SSRS-Reports/RevenueCycle/DailyRevenue.rdl.
Pixel-perfect month-end financial report for printing and PDF distribution. Migrated from SSRS with preserved formatting.

sections.name: Clinical
sections.description: Patient care, census, and surgical outcomes — replaces Crystal Reports client application and SSRS /Clinical/ folder

items.description: Real-time ward occupancy and patient census. Migrated from CrystalReports/PatientCensus.rpt. RLS enforces physician-level patient filtering server-side (HIPAA improvement over legacy client-side filtering).
Surgical procedure outcomes with complication rate analysis. Migrated from CrystalReports/SurgicalOutcomes.rpt. Eliminates N+1 sub-report pattern.

sections.name: Regulatory
sections.description: CMS quality metrics and regulatory submission reports — replaces SSRS /Clinical/QualityMetrics and paginated regulatory filings

items.description: CMS quality metrics dashboard with KPI cards and conditional formatting. Migrated from SSRS-Reports/Clinical/QualityMetrics.rdl.
Pixel-perfect Joint Commission regulatory submission with required formatting and signature blocks.
CMS regulatory submission report with exact layout requirements for government filing.

sections.name: Executive
sections.description: Cross-functional executive view — replaces SSRS /Executive/ folder that required Domain Admins access

items.description: All-department revenue view for executive leadership. Same report as Financial > Daily Revenue but executives see all departments via ExecutiveRole RLS.
Organization-wide quality metrics for executive review. Same report as Regulatory > CMS Quality Metrics but included here for executive navigation convenience.
All-ward patient census overview. Executives see all patients via ExecutiveRole RLS.
Organization-wide surgical outcomes and complication rates.

audiences.name: ClinicalStaff
audiences.description: Physicians, nurses, and clinical analysts. Replaces Crystal Reports viewer access and SSRS /Clinical/ Browse permissions.
audiences.rlsEnforcement: PhysicianRole — physicians see only their patients; nursing supervisors see all wards via ExecutiveRole

audiences.name: FinanceStaff
audiences.description: CFO, finance analysts, and department managers. Replaces SSRS /RevenueCycle/ Browse permissions and Daily Revenue email subscription list.
audiences.rlsEnforcement: DepartmentRole — department managers see their department only; CFO sees all via ExecutiveRole

audiences.name: RegulatoryCompliance
audiences.description: Quality director, compliance officers, and regulatory analysts. Replaces SSRS /Clinical/ Browse permissions for quality reports and monthly Excel subscription distribution.
audiences.rlsEnforcement: ExecutiveRole — unrestricted access to all quality and compliance data

audiences.name: ExecutiveLeadership
audiences.description: C-suite executives with full cross-functional access. Replaces SSRS Domain Admins full-control access and Crystal Reports direct viewer access.
